title: User Login with Valid Credentials
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in with valid username and password.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter valid username and password
Click login button
Verify user is redirected to the dashboard with notifications and quick stats visible

title: User Login with Invalid Credentials
description: Verify that login fails with incorrect username or password and appropriate error is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter invalid username and/or password
Click login button
Verify login attempt fails and error message is displayed

title: Create Surat Tugas with Multiple Recipients and Auto Numbering
description: Verify that a Surat Tugas can be created with multiple recipients, automatic letter numbering including suffix for derivative letters.

steps.description: Navigate to Surat Tugas create page
Fill in all mandatory fields including letter details and recipients
Submit the Surat Tugas
Verify Surat Tugas is saved with correct letter number assigned and all recipients linked

title: Edit Surat Tugas and Save Changes
description: Verify editing an existing Surat Tugas updates data correctly and preserves letter numbering rules.

steps.description: Navigate to Surat Tugas list and select an existing record
Modify letter details and recipients
Save changes
Verify the Surat Tugas details are updated successfully and letter number remains consistent

title: Submit Surat Tugas for Approval and Approver Notification
description: Verify Surat Tugas submission triggers notification to designated approvers and locks editing.

steps.description: Submit a completed Surat Tugas for approval
Verify approvers receive notifications based on their preferences (in-app and email queued)
Verify Surat Tugas becomes locked for editing during approval workflow

title: Approve Surat Tugas with Digital Signature and Stamp
description: Verify an approver can approve a Surat Tugas and apply configured digital signatures and stamps.

steps.description: Login as approver and access pending Surat Tugas approval
Review letter details and click approve
Apply digital signature and configurable stamp on approval
Verify the letter status is updated to approved and signatures/stamps are embedded

title: Reject Surat Tugas and Comment Recording
description: Verify that an approver can reject a Surat Tugas with comments and system records rejection details.

steps.description: Login as approver and select a Surat Tugas pending approval
Reject the letter with a comment specifying reason
Verify letter status updates to rejected and rejection comments are stored

title: Preview and Download Surat Tugas PDF
description: Verify that users can preview Surat Tugas in PDF format with accurate content and layout and download finalized letters.

steps.description: Open a finalized Surat Tugas for preview
Verify the PDF rendering shows correct data with proper formatting and watermarks
Download the Surat Tugas PDF
Verify the downloaded PDF file is complete and opens without errors

title: Create and Manage Surat Keputusan including Attachments
description: Verify that users can create and manage Surat Keputusan with legal considerations and attachments through full workflow.

steps.description: Navigate to Surat Keputusan create page
Fill required fields including legal texts and upload attachments securely
Submit Surat Keputusan for approval
Verify Surat Keputusan is saved with attachments linked and notifications sent to approvers

title: Edit Surat Keputusan and Maintain Attachment Integrity
description: Verify editing Surat Keputusan maintains attachment data and updates legal considerations properly.

steps.description: Select existing Surat Keputusan to edit
Change letter details and add/remove attachments
Save changes
Verify data saved correctly and attachments are correctly linked or removed

title: Surat Keputusan Approval Workflow with Notifications
description: Verify Surat Keputusan approval process including notifications, status changes and audit recording.

steps.description: Submit Surat Keputusan for approval
Verify approvers receive notifications (queue email and in-app) based on preferences
Approvers approve or reject with comments
Verify letter status updates appropriately and all actions are logged in audit trail

title: Manage Users and Role-Based Access Control
description: Verify CRUD operations for users and roles, role-based permission enforcement and soft delete functionality.

steps.description: Create a new user and assign roles
Verify user permissions reflect assigned roles accurately
Edit user details and assign/remove roles
Soft delete a user
Verify user access is revoked and user remains in data for retention
Attempt to perform forbidden actions with a restricted role
Verify access is denied accordingly

title: Master Data Management for Classifications and Task Types
description: Verify CRUD functionality for classifications, task types, and letterhead templates.

steps.description: Create new classification, task type, and letterhead template
Verify entries appear correctly in lists and are usable for letter creation
Edit and delete entries
Verify updates reflect in the system and deletes handle dependencies safely

title: Letter Template CRUD and Usage
description: Verify creation, editing, and deletion of letter templates; verify templates apply correctly during surat creation.

steps.description: Create new letter template with placeholders
Verify template is saved and visible in template list
Use template during Surat creation and verify auto-filled fields
Edit template content and save
Verify updates propagate to new letters created from template
Delete a template
Verify template is removed and letters using it remain unaffected

title: Notification Preferences and Delivery
description: Verify users can configure notification preferences and receive timely in-app and queued email notifications for workflow events.

steps.description: Access notification preferences and update settings
Verify preferences are saved correctly
Trigger workflow events (e.g., letter submission for approval)
Verify notifications are delivered per user preferences and notification states are recorded

title: Audit Log Recording for Key User Actions
description: Verify audit logs record all significant user actions with complete details for transparency and accountability.

steps.description: Perform actions such as creating, editing, approving letters, and managing users
Access audit log interface
Verify audit entries capture correct user, action, timestamp, and affected data details

title: Generate and Manage Nomor Surat Counters and Formatting
description: Verify system generates and manages letter number counters correctly for all letter types and derivative suffixes.

steps.description: Create multiple Surat Tugas and Surat Keputusan consecutively
Verify each letter is assigned a unique number in correct format and sequence
Create derivative Surat Tugas and verify suffix numbering
Verify derivative letters have proper suffix appended to the base number

title: Export Reports to Excel, CSV, and PDF
description: Verify report exports produce accurate and complete files in all supported formats with correct letter and user data.

steps.description: Navigate to reporting dashboard
Select data filters and generate reports
Export reports in Excel, CSV, and PDF formats
Verify exported files are generated correctly and open without errors with accurate data

title: Input Validation and Sanitization for All User Inputs
description: Verify that all user inputs are validated for format, length, and required fields, and properly sanitized to prevent injection and XSS attacks.

steps.description: Attempt to submit forms with missing required fields, invalid data, and malicious scripts
Verify form shows validation errors and rejects unsafe input
Inspect stored data to confirm input sanitization is applied

title: Session-Based Authentication and CSRF Protection
description: Verify that authentication uses session management securely and that CSRF tokens are required and validated on all sensitive requests.

steps.description: Login to the system and perform operations requiring authentication
Verify session is maintained securely and expiry works as expected
Attempt CSRF attack by submitting requests without valid token
Verify requests without valid CSRF tokens are rejected

title: Responsive UI Layout Consistency
description: Verify the user interface is responsive and renders properly across different screen sizes and browsers, consistent with Blade templates and frontend components.

steps.description: Access all main pages including dashboard, letter creation, approval, and management using desktop, tablet, and mobile screen sizes
Verify layout components such as navbar, sidebar, buttons, form fields, and tables display and behave correctly without overlap or clipping
